# Geographic range

Records were filtered by removing records that did not fall within an area of interest: `r report_name` (Figure \@ref(fig:geographicRangeFig)).

```{r geographicRangeFig, fig.cap = paste0("Boundary of the area of interest: ", report_full_name)}

use_sf <- if(exists("aoi_sf")) aoi_sf else extent_sf

m <- tm_shape(use_sf) +
  tm_borders()

m <- tmap::tmap_leaflet(m)

m

```
